query: SELECT id, organizationId, fileName, fileType, driveFileId, s3Key, category FROM partnerDocuments WHERE fileName LIKE '%RRAL%' OR fileName LIKE '%procedure%' OR fileName LIKE '%excel%' OR fileName LIKE '%xlsx%' OR fileName LIKE '%xls%' LIMIT 10;
